entries.title: tauri-plugin-shell open rejects filesystem paths by default
entries.appliesWhen: Calling @tauri-apps/plugin-shell open() on a filesystem path/directory rather than a URL

entries.title: Identity migration: storage key first, display lags behind
entries.appliesWhen: Any change that introduces a new true identity alongside an existing display identity (rename, scope-move, identity-normalization, alias migration) with multiple consuming UI surfaces

entries.title: Async child save handler must not mutate store before parent onSaved
entries.appliesWhen: React + external store; child takes onSaved prop and has direct access to store mutator; parent useEffect depends on store and drives visible render

entries.title: spectra analyze Consistency check uses literal keyword matching against task descriptions
entries.appliesWhen: Ingesting/proposing a Spectra change where design.md gets new Decision headings and tasks describe coverage in their own wording without quoting the Decision title verbatim

entries.title: Page layout scaffold height contract (PageHeader + PageBody)
entries.appliesWhen: Building or debugging routed pages using PageScaffold or any full-height internal-scroll layout

entries.title: UI consistency design-time checklist
entries.appliesWhen: Designing any change that adds or modifies UI pages/components

entries.title: Windows: git checkout leaves files falsely modified (CRLF stat cache), can abort merge
entries.appliesWhen: On Windows when git reports tracked files modified or blocks merge/checkout but git diff is empty
